blended.narrative: Ski Wentworth is expecting dry conditions over the next 48 hours. Looking ahead, 13 inches possible over the next 14 days. Mild temps with highs near 46°F.

daily_summary.narrative: Wednesday: light freezing drizzle, highs of 36°F.
Thursday: light freezing drizzle, highs of 51°F.
Friday: 2.1" of snow, highs of 42°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Saturday: 4" of snow, highs of 36°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
